page_metadata.biotools__summary: MonteCarbo is a software to generate and dock multifunctionalized ring molecules. It is able to construct simple 5-, 6- and 7-membered ring multifunctionalized monosaccharides and nucleobases and to dock them into target glyco- and RNA DNA- active enzymes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MonteCarbo is a software to generate and dock multifunctionalized ring molecules. It is able to construct simple 5-, 6- and 7-membered ring multifunctionalized monosaccharides and nucleobases and to dock them into target glyco- and RNA DNA- active enzymes.
